name: create_dashboard
full_help:
create_dashboard

Description: 
Create the Project summary dashboard

Syntax: 
create_dashboard  -name <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -name       Name of the dashboard
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
